package rulefixtures

// scenario for goroutine_for_sync_work: `go func() { result <- compute() }()` followed by `<-result` where the goroutine is immediately awaited
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule599PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario599Positive(records []Rule599PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
